# Ovineko

> A collection of tools born from friction. Solutions that stay. Tools for React and SPA development that exist because once upon a time, weeks were spent solving problems you never wanted to rebuild.

Ovineko is a quiet guardian at the threshold — a monorepo of opinionated TypeScript packages that preserve proven solutions. Every package here exists because it solved a real problem that shouldn't need solving again. The core offering is spa-guard, a family of 7 packages that handle chunk-loading errors, automatic retry with cache busting, error reporting via beacons, and fallback UI rendering. Additional packages provide type-safe React Router wrappers, pre-configured Fastify servers, and shared tooling configuration.

All packages target React 19 and are published as ESM-only with full TypeScript type declarations.

## Packages

### spa-guard

- [spa-guard Overview](https://ovineko.com/docs/spa-guard/overview): Architecture and concepts for the spa-guard package family
- [spa-guard Core](https://ovineko.com/docs/spa-guard/core): Runtime error handling, automatic retry with cache busting, schema validation, i18n
- [spa-guard React](https://ovineko.com/docs/spa-guard/react): React hooks, components (lazyWithRetry, Spinner), error boundaries
- [spa-guard React Router](https://ovineko.com/docs/spa-guard/react-router): React Router v7 error boundary integration
- [spa-guard Vite](https://ovineko.com/docs/spa-guard/vite): Vite plugin for build-time script injection
- [spa-guard Node](https://ovineko.com/docs/spa-guard/node): Server-side HTML cache with ETag/304, pre-compression, i18n
- [spa-guard Fastify](https://ovineko.com/docs/spa-guard/fastify): Fastify plugin for beacon endpoint and HTML cache handler
- [spa-guard ESLint](https://ovineko.com/docs/spa-guard/eslint): ESLint rules (no-direct-lazy, no-direct-error-boundary)

### Other Packages

- [react-router](https://ovineko.com/docs/packages/react-router): Type-safe wrapper for React Router v7 with valibot schema validation
- [fastify-base](https://ovineko.com/docs/packages/fastify-base): Pre-configured Fastify server with Sentry, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry
- [clean-pkg-json](https://ovineko.com/docs/packages/clean-pkg-json): Zero-config tool to clean package.json before publishing
- [datamitsu-config](https://ovineko.com/docs/packages/datamitsu-config): Shared configuration for datamitsu linting and formatting tooling
